title: Anthony Heald
content:

|death=

|nationality=*[[Wikipedia:American|American]]<ref name="Oregonlive">{{WebCite|url=https://www.oregonlive.com/O/2010/06/seasoned_by_broadway_and_holly.html|text=Seasoned by Broadway and Hollywood, actor Anthony Heald reaches new peaks at the Oregon Shakespeare Festival|archivedate=20231003051123}}</ref>
|occupation=*[[Wikipedia:Actor|Actor]]<ref name="Audiofile">{{WebCite|url=https://www.audiofilemagazine.com/narrators/anthony-heald/|text=Talking with Anthony Heald|archivedate=20240525164254}}</ref>

|companies=
|website=

'''Anthony Heald''' (born [[1940s|1944]], [[Wikipedia:New Rochelle, New York|New Rochelle, New York]])<ref name="1000 voices" /> is an [[Wikipedia:American|American]] [[Wikipedia:Actor|actor]] and [[Wikipedia:Voice actor|voice artist]] known for portraying [[Wikipedia:Frederick Chilton|Dr. Frederick Chilton]] in [[Wikipedia:The Silence of the Lambs|''The Silence of the Lambs'']] as well as narrating numberous audiobooks.<ref name="Oregonlive" /> From [[1993]] to [[2000]], Heald narrated thirty four abridged ''[[Star Wars]]'' audiobooks, including [[The Truce at Bakura (audiobook)|''The Truce at Bakura'']],<ref name="Truce at Bakura">[[The Truce at Bakura (audiobook)|''The Truce at Bakura'' abridged audiobook]]</ref> [[The Courtship of Princess Leia (abridged audiobook)|''The Courtship of Princess Leia'']],<ref name="Courtship">[[The Courtship of Princess Leia (abridged audiobook)|''The Courtship of Princess Leia'' abridged audiobook]]</ref> and [[I, Jedi (abridged audiobook)|''I, Jedi'']].<ref name="I, Jedi">[[I, Jedi (abridged audiobook)|''I, Jedi'' abridged audiobook]]</ref>

{{Bio-stub}}
